name: mdx-handwritten-scene
description: Deterministic semantic Scene plans for MDX Handwritten

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/recipes.ts --format esm --sourcemap --clean --minify terser --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --dts-only --clean false --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && tsup src/recipes.ts --format esm --dts --dts-only --clean false --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
